Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Detected but outside of defined area.
Unable to detect (not found in area)
Detected but outside of defined area.
If the ECU supplies the ESCL(input of the relay)
sensor not supplied or sensor failure

ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Item.Text: Forgetting P Return Warning (Inside the Vehicle) for NAM
Forgetting P Return Warning (Inside the Vehicle) except for NAM
Power Position is changed from LOCK to IGN.
Power Position is changed from OFF to IGN.
Power Position is changed from CRANKING to RUN.
Power Position is changed from CRANKING to IGN.
Power Position is changed from IGN to RUN.
Power Position is changed from RUN to IGN.
Power Position is changed from RUN/IGN to OFF.
Emergency engine stop(Long pressing PES SW)
Emergency engine stop(3 times pressing PES SW)
Push PES SW with with vehicle speed.
Idle stop function is canceled by switch.
Idle stop function is well performed.
Idle stop function is cancelling and staring Engine.

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: [KeyFOB ID readout function]___DataRead$0103_#04_bit7_KeyFOB ID readout function Not registered

Item.Text: receive ID has been registered or non ID received
received ID has not been registered

received ID is equal to ID in memory 1 to 4
received ID is not equal to ID in memory 4
received ID is equal to ID in memory 4

received ID is equal to ID in memory 3

received ID is equal to ID in memory 2
received ID is not equal to ID in memory 1
received ID is equal to ID in memory 1
receive ID has been registered or non ID received
received ID has not been registered

if the level of the SensorLine is 1
if the level of the SensorLine is 0
if the level of the SensorLine is 1

if the ECU supplies the ESCL(output of the relay)

if the ECU is executing a EV_R_ESCL_LOCKING
if the last power supply sequence has failed
sensor not supplied or sensor failure
